Sneha Singh

DevOps Engineer | MLOps Enthusiast

Hi, I’m Sneha Singh — a DevOps Engineer passionate about automation, CI/CD pipelines, cloud technologies, and infrastructure management. I have experience working with Git, GitHub Actions, Linux, Docker, and deployment workflows.

I am currently expanding my skills into MLOps, cybersecurity, and AI-powered automation solutions for e-commerce platforms. I enjoy building efficient systems and learning modern technologies.
